name: get_isochrone
description: Generate isochrone polygons showing areas reachable within a given travel time or distance from a starting point. Returns GeoJSON polygons or linestrings for one or more contour values. Supports driving, walking, and cycling profiles.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Routing profile. One of: mapbox/driving, mapbox/driving-traffic, mapbox/walking, mapbox/cycling.

parameters.name: contours_minutes
parameters.description: Comma-separated travel time contours in minutes (1-60). Cannot be used with contours_meters.

parameters.name: contours_meters
parameters.description: Comma-separated distance contours in meters (1-100000). Cannot be used with contours_minutes.

parameters.name: contours_colors
parameters.description: Comma-separated hex color codes for each contour (without #).

parameters.name: polygons
parameters.description: Whether to return filled polygons (true) or linestrings (false). Default is false.

parameters.name: denoise
parameters.description: Noise filtering threshold from 0.0 to 1.0. Higher values produce smoother contours. Default is 1.0.
